name: augenta
description: Augenta — opt-in, per-project capture of your coding agent's activity and project memory to your Augenta Neurospace. Ask "Initialize Augenta" in a project to enable it.

interface.longDescription: Augenta captures your coding agent's activity and matching project memory from projects you explicitly opt in, and ships them to your Augenta Neurospace. Nothing is captured until you initialize a project.
